title: no more bedrock leak
description: a simple texture pack that changes bedrock to be a new texture that cant rotate. the texture cant rotate so your cords dot get leaked. recommended for smp's
body: a simple retexture of bedrock so people cant use bedrock to find your cords. made for smp's. first project made by puzzledpeace650. recomended to use 1.21.9-1.21.11 made for smp live streamers that go to peoples bases
